instruction: Buatkan game edukasi dengan parameter berikut sesuai JSON schema yang telah ditentukan. Output hanya JSON valid, tanpa komentar atau teks tambahan.

output._comment: Full JSON envelope + payload sesuai schema. Wajib include:
_fields: metadata: title, subject, grade_level, bab, subbab, topik, difficulty, estimated_duration_minutes, learning_objectives, language
presentation.opening: id, show_once, title, story, image_description, cta_text

presentation.visual_element: theme_name, theme_preset, mood, color_palette (termasuk gradient_bg), setting_description, art_style, ambient_elements, canvas_scene (render_method, background_layers, objects, particle_effects), ui_components (button_style, card_style, score_display_style, input_style)
payload: sesuai game_type (word_game/puzzle_game/sim_lab schema). Untuk sim_lab WAJIB include scene (interactive_objects, visual_feedback, animation_on_run)
